title: [PatPat] Loomian Ecstatic Animation
description: A Resource Pack for the Mod and Plugin PatPat.
body:
# 💬 Description
A resource pack created for the LLO Community. It replaces the Default Hand and the Default Sound from the official [PatPat Mod and Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/patpat) with the "Ecstatic Icon" and a Squeak toy sound for every entitiy in game.

# 🎞️Animation Showcase
![Patting the Minecraft Sheep entity to showcase the PatPat Retextured animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38aa2948576b40ccd75622f524343d1b70b244d8.gif)
